en: Don't have sex.
That's correct. That's usually when you get murdered.
Yeah. Don't drink or do drugs.
Yeah, that's another one that happens.
And never say, I'll be right back.
Yeah, that is correct.
Anything else you would like to add to that now that you've done?
ko: 이제 공포영화 만들어봤으니까 더 추가할 거 있어?

en: I think nowadays, for me, it's like,
just know where the knives are in the house.
ko: 집에 칼이 어디 있는지 알아두는 거야.

en: Smart. Maybe take your chip out of your phone
ko: 똑똑하네. 추적 안 당하려면 폰에서 칩을 빼는 것도.

en: if you don't want people to find you.
ko: 좋은 거다, 그치? 사실 진짜 좋은 거지.

en: That's a good one, right? It's a great one, actually.
And I think the one you always got to do
ko: 문 밖으로 뛰어나가는 거지, 계단 위로 올라가지 말고.

en: is run out the door and not up the stairs.
Which seems really obvious, but it's amazing
ko: 아직도 계단 위로 올라가는 사람이 많아.

en: how many of us are still running up the stairs.
Still running up the stairs, yeah.
Isn't it amazing how the phones have changed?
Well, that's what I love about these movies,
because at the beginning, we had the big, white one.
And then they get slightly smaller, so now it's like...
They're in the house. Yeah, I can hear them.
